verse.name: V1
V2
verse.lines: Shine on me, Lord, shine on me, Let the light from the Lighthouse shine on me; Shine on me, Lord, shine on me, Let the light from the Lighthouse shine on me.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: To be like Jesus, To be like Jesus, On earth I Iong to be like Him; All thru life's journey from earth to glory I only ask to be like Him

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Turn your eyes upon Jesus, Look full in His wonderful face; And the things of earth Will grow strangely dim In the light of His glory and grace.

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: Jesus is the one, Yes He's the only one, Let Him have His way Until the day is done; When He speaks, you know The clouds will have to go, Just because He loves you so.
